name: Chad Underwood
summary: Former U.S. Navy aviator who recorded the FLIR1 video during the 2004 Nimitz encounter.
profileSummary: Former U.S. Navy aviator who recorded the FLIR1 video during the 2004 Nimitz encounter.
background: Former U.S. Navy F/A-18 pilot who tracked and recorded the object using aircraft sensors.
inclusionNote: Included because he operated the sensor system that produced one of the most significant publicly released videos connected to the Nimitz case.

primarySourceLinks.label: Interview about recording the Tic Tac video
